w.name: Praise & Words
w.description: For you, encouraging words mean more than anything. You live on verbal appreciation.

g.name: Gifts
g.description: You feel loved through giving. It's not about price, but the thought behind it.

a.name: Service
a.description: Concrete actions are proof of love for you. You feel loved when someone lightens your burden.

p.name: Physical Touch
p.description: For you, love is most real through touch: hugs, handholds, or a pat on the shoulder.

q.name: Quality Time
q.description: You are happiest when spending uninterrupted time with loved ones.
